This release publishes the image on Docker Hub (shorter pull tag) and adds a startup readiness banner.

## Added
- **READY log banner** — the container prints a loud `MATRIX IS READY` banner to the log once Synapse answers on its health endpoint (`127.0.0.1:8008/health`), so you can tell when the 30–60 s first start has finished.
- **Docker Hub image** — the image is now mirrored to Docker Hub (`junkerderprovinz/matrix`) alongside GHCR (which stays the primary registry), giving a shorter pull tag.

## Changed
- The Unraid template and README now reference the Docker Hub image.
- The template `Project` link points at the official Matrix site; the GitHub repo stays reachable via the ReadMe link and the Overview.
